libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Configure KafkaAvroSerializer/KafkaAvroDeserializer with a test config map that includes `schema.registry.url` set to a unique `mock://<scope>` value. Prefer GenericRecord/SchemaBuilder Avro round trips and drop/clear the MockSchemaRegistry scope after the test. Do not require a real Kafka broker or Schema Registry service unless local verification proves otherwise.
risks: Using an `http://` schema.registry.url would require a running Schema Registry service, but the library provides `MockSchemaRegistry` for tests.
End-to-end KafkaProducer/KafkaConsumer tests would require a broker, but direct serializer/deserializer tests should provide meaningful coverage without Docker.
SpecificRecord coverage may require generated Avro classes; GenericRecord avoids extra build setup.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Meaningful serializer/deserializer coverage needs Schema Registry configuration, but the resolved transitive dependencies include Confluent's in-memory mock registry, so no extra Maven dependency or Docker image is needed.
